Source

Cast to YouTube Music

Paste any YouTube or YouTube Music URL (single video or playlist). The radio switches source and starts streaming immediately.

Play Jellyfin Playlist

Enter a Jellyfin Playlist ID. The radio switches source and starts streaming immediately.

Koel Radio

Select a source type and pick from the list, then click Play.

Output

FH6 Universal Radio — an open-source mod by g0ldyy and contributors. Released under GPLv3.
